data.title: Manus AI unveils tools for iOS and Android devs to automate app packaging, reducing deployment time from days to minutes.
data.description: Manus AI has unveiled a new feature, App Sharing and Testing, which streamlines app packaging for Google Play and TestFlight. This innovation significantly reduces deployment time from several days to a matter of minutes.

data.title: Animal Rescue Corps in Missouri rescues 18 dogs due to cold weather; organization educates about proper pet care.
data.description: Due to the recent cold weather, concerned residents reached out to the animal protection organization in Doniphan, Missouri on January 19, 2026. The national nonprofit, Animal Rescue Corps (ARC), swiftly responded by rescuing a total of 18 dogs and puppies that were found living outside on a remote rural property.

data.title: Bradford White debuts eF Series® Turbo commercial water heater with up to 97% thermal efficiency. AMBLER, Pa., Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: Bradford White Water Heaters introduces the latest model, Turbo, continuing the success of the eF Series®. This new product boasts a remarkable thermal efficiency of up to 97%. The company, based in Ambler, Pennsylvania, made the announcement on January 19, 2026. Known for producing water heaters, boilers, and storage units, Bradford White continues to innovate and provide top-notch products to its customers.

data.title: CAE appoints Ryan McLeod as CFO, effective Feb 23, 2026. Leading global finance organization.
data.description: Montreal, January 19, 2026 - CAE Inc. has appointed Ryan McLeod, CPA, CA, as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting from February 23, 2026. Mr. McLeod will take charge of CAE's worldwide finance division, contributing significantly to the company's financial operations. The appointment marks a crucial step for CAE (NYSE: CAE) (TSX: CAE) as they continue to strengthen their leadership team.

data.title: TOKI establishes unified liquidity pools linking Ethereum and BNB Chain through IBC, boosting Cosmos ecosystem's growth.
data.description: The launch of unified liquidity pools by TOKI connects Ethereum and BNB Chain through the IBC protocol, a move that signifies a substantial cross-chain expansion within the Cosmos ecosystem. This development allows for seamless interaction between the two chains, providing users with increased flexibility and opportunities. This integration enhances liquidity provision for assets on both Ethereum and BNB Chain, potentially unlocking new opportunities for traders and investors. The initiative could pave the way for further advancements in cross-chain interoperability and collaboration within the decentralized finance space.

data.title: Red Bull brings back Red Bull Iced Edition and Red Bull Peach Edition to retailers nationwide with and without sugar.
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, on January 19, 2026, Red Bull has revealed the exciting comeback of two beloved items: the Red Bull Iced Edition and Red Bull Peach Edition are now available in stores across the country, in both sugar and sugar-free options. These products, previously referred to as the Red Bull Winter versions, are back and ready for purchase by fans everywhere.

data.title: Global construction equipment market valued at $192.59 billion in 2025, expected to reach $283.22 billion by 2031.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of January 19, 2026, the global construction equipment market is set for significant expansion, with a value of USD 192.59 billion in 2025. It is projected to grow from USD 205.38 billion in 2026 to reach USD 283.22 billion by...

data.title: Sherritt reports $7.7M dividends in Q4 2025, totaling $26.0M for the year, double from 2024 - CEO comments on progress.
data.description: Sherritt International Corporation (TSX:S) based in Toronto disclosed its production outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. In the last quarter of 2025, Sherritt obtained $7.7 million in dividends from Energas S.A. in Canada, accumulating to $26.0 million for the year, which is twice the amount received in 2024, which was $13.0 million. Dr. Peter Hancock, the Interim Chief Executive Officer of Sherritt, remarked on the results, expressing his views since taking on the role in December.

data.title: Opus One Gold closes 2nd private placement: 5,235,000 units sold at $0.065 each, totaling $340,275; each unit contains a share and a warrant.
data.description: In Montreal on January 19, 2026, Opus One Gold Corporation (OOR: TSXV) announced the final closing of a non-brokered private placement. They sold 5,235,000 units at $0.065 per unit, raising $340,275 in gross proceeds. Each unit includes one common share and one common share purchase warrant. The warrant allows the holder to buy one common share at $0.10 per share for 24 months after the placement closes.

data.title: Microchip adds SDI IP cores, Quad CoaXPress Bridge Kit to enhance video ecosystem for developers.
data.description: Integrated video solution packages bundle together hardware components, development tools, IP cores, and reference designs to simplify the development process and enhance security measures.
Evergold reveals alterations in management and board lineup.

data.title: AirBoss announces resignation of Jo-Anne O'Connor from its Board of Directors due to other commitments.
data.description: In Newmarket, Ontario on January 19, 2026, AirBoss of America Corp. (TSX: BOS) (OTCQX: ABSSF) revealed that Jo-Anne O’Connor has stepped down from its Board of Directors on January 16, 2026. This departure is attributed to O’Connor's other professional responsibilities. The Company expressed appreciation for O’Connor's input and extends well wishes for her future pursuits.

data.title: Barrick Mining appoints Helen Cai as CFO, effective March 1, 2026, following Graham Shuttleworth's departure after year-end results.
data.description: In Toronto on January 19, 2026, Barrick Mining Corporation appointed Helen Cai as the Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Ms. Cai is set to take over the role on March 1, 2026, succeeding Graham Shuttleworth, who is departing Barrick post the disclosure of the Company's year-end outcomes. There will be an overlap period where Ms. Cai will collaborate with Mr. Shuttleworth to facilitate a seamless handover before his exit.

data.title: ATS CFO Ryan McLeod resigns, effective Feb 15, 2026, Anne Cybulski to be interim CFO. Search for permanent replacement ongoing.
data.description: In Cambridge, Ontario, ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) disclosed that Ryan McLeod is stepping down from his position as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) to explore an opportunity in a different industry. Mr. McLeod's last day with the company will be on February 15, 2026. Anne Cybulski, VP of Corporate Controller, will take over as interim CFO following Mr. McLeod's exit while a search for a new permanent CFO is initiated. Anne Cybulski will hold the interim position until a suitable replacement is found.

data.title: Brad Dever appointed as Chief Commercial Officer & Managing Director at CloudAvanti on Jan 19, boosting firm's growth in North America.
data.description: In a significant move for CloudAvanti, Brad Dever has recently joined the company on January 19th. His appointment as Chief Commercial Officer and Managing Director is set to bolster the firm's commercial leadership as it expands its operations throughout North America. With this new role, Brad will spearhead the development of go-to-market strategies, drive client expansion initiatives, and cultivate strategic partnerships for the company. This development marks a key milestone in CloudAvanti's growth trajectory, with Brad's vast experience expected to play a pivotal role in scaling the business.
